# Copied Hugging Face Skills

These skills were selected for ML-heavy physics research workflows: datasets, papers, local models, model evaluation, and retrieval/model training. Broader Hub administration, app deployment, and nonessential demo skills were not copied.

## Copied

- `huggingface-datasets`
- `huggingface-papers`
- `huggingface-local-models`
- `huggingface-community-evals`
- `train-sentence-transformers`
